steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage establishes a distinction between thalassocracies (sea powers) and tellurocracies (land powers), yet describes the British Empire extending hegemony across both domains.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Blurring this line” means the categorical boundary becomes ambiguous—exactly the point when a power operates in both domains. The other three suggest the example validates the distinction. That matches choice D — D is correct.
